# Task Closeout

Use at the end of non-trivial project work.

1. Run or report the closest practical verification.
2. Inspect `git status -sb --ignored --untracked-files=all`.
3. Report changed files and why they changed.
4. Report verification commands and results.
5. Report remaining risk or skipped checks.
6. State whether new durable knowledge should become a rule, decision, memory entry, runbook, or skill.
7. Include the required isolation line.

Do not claim no deduction items unless every required proof in `docs/agents/verify.yaml` is satisfied.
